key.name: shortcut-key
key.description: Shortcut to start/stop speech to text

key.name: save-path
key.description: Path where the record will be saved (relative to home or absolute)

key.name: whisper-model-path
key.description: Path to the GGML model for whisper-server

key.name: history-enabled
key.description: Whether to keep historical record of recordings and transcripts

key.name: history-directory
key.description: Folder where WAV audio and TXT transcripts will be chronologically saved

key.name: whisper-language
key.description: Language spoken in the recording ('auto' for auto-detect)

key.name: whisper-autostart
key.description: Whether to start/stop the whisper-server with the extension lifecycle

key.name: whisper-threads
key.description: Number of CPU threads whisper-server will use during computation

key.name: show-notification
key.description: Whether to show a notification when speech is copied to clipboard
